headline: Sentiment down 27% this week, optimism declining
key_insights: Fears trending up 55% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 108 quotes and 69 at strong intensity, though the score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak.
• At 33.5, frustrations remain well above the typical range but are cooling from recent highs.
• Fears recovered substantially from yesterday's very low level, while optimism stayed deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
